_meta.scope: deployed-20, web-validatable (validated+doable), one export per factor
_meta.status_legend: pending вҶ’ done(вң… parity) / diverged(вң— real gap) / blocked / skipped
procedure_per_factor: 1. жһңд»Ғ web: rank-ONLY on this single indicator, universe to match (or a broad universe вҖ” factor VALUES are иҢғеӣҙ/universe-invariant), йҖүиӮЎж—Ҙжңҹ вүӨ local calendar max.
2. еҜјеҮә вҶ’ rename жһңд»Ғ_{date}_{universe}_{indicator}.xlsx under Knowledge/жһңд»ҒйӘҢиҜҒеӣ еӯҗ/.
3. derive/confirm the local_expr (validated rows already have it; doable rows: map the жһңд»Ғ_formula вҶ’ local qlib expr via guorn_local_field_mapping.md conventions).
5. record status/verdict here (re-run this script preserves it).

factors.verdict: вң… VERIFIED (2026-07-01, T1 batch): penny-exact + top-K 100/100/100. жһңд»Ғ зңҹе®һиҙҹеҖәиө„дә§зҺҮ = иҙҹеҖәеҗҲи®Ў/(иө„дә§жҖ»и®ЎвҲ’е•ҶиӘүвҲ’ж— еҪўиө„дә§вҲ’ејҖеҸ‘ж”ҜеҮә) (еү”йҷӨиҷҡиө„дә§еҗҺзҡ„зңҹе®һжқ жқҶ; жһңд»Ғ еҸҜиҪ¬еҖәзі»з»ҹжҢҮж Ү def, иҙўеҠЎжҢҮж Ү--жё…еҒҝиғҪеҠӣ). Local $total_liab_q0/($total_assets_q0 - $goodwill_q0 - $intan_assets_q0 - $r_and_d_q0) with NaN->0 coalesce on the 3 subtracted intangibles (banks / no-goodwill / non-capitalizing-R&D firms report NaN not 0). cov 99.9% (4408/4412), med rel-err 0.0052%, within-1% 99.9%, sign 100%, Spearman/Pearson 1.000, top-5/10/20 = 100%. lag 0. жһңд»Ғ_20251231_жҺ’йҷӨSTжҺ’йҷӨз§‘еҲӣ_жҺ’еҗҚ-зңҹе®һиҙҹеҖәиө„дә§зҺҮ.xlsx

в—‘ RANK-FAITHFUL, VALUE-DIVERGED (2026-07-01, T1 batch): top-5/10/20 = 100%/90%/85%, Spearman 0.935, but value NOT penny-exact (within-5% only 22%; median rel-err inflated by the zero-centered denominator). Structure CONFIRMED: AvgQ(жҖ»иӮЎжң¬,4,0)/AvgQ(жҖ»иӮЎжң¬,4,4)-1 = (ОЈ$total_share_q0..3)/(ОЈ$total_share_q4..7)-1; MANY stable-share firms match near-exactly (зҙўйҖҡеҸ‘еұ• -0.0790 vs -0.079027, е№ҝдёңжҳҺзҸ , иҙӨдё°жҺ§иӮЎ, ж—ҘеҸ‘зІҫжңә). Divergences concentrate on MAJOR-share-change firms (дёӯиҲӘжҲҗйЈһ 3.53 vs 2.65, жҜ”дәҡиҝӘ 1.09 vs 0.56, жӯҘжӯҘй«ҳ 0.52 vs 1.06, broker mergers еӣҪиҒ”ж°‘з”ҹ/еӣҪжі°жө·йҖҡ) => ROOT CAUSE = жҖ»иӮЎжң¬ SOURCE/timing: local $total_share_qN = balancesheet жңҹжң«жҖ»иӮЎжң¬ (recognizes еўһеҸ‘/еӣһиҙӯ at the report date); жһңд»Ғ's AvgQ жҖ»иӮЎжң¬ recognizes share changes on the effective/market date -> the two diverge exactly on еўһеҸ‘/еӣһиҙӯ/M&A firms. A vendor/source diff, NOT a local bug (stable-share firms are exact). Rank-usable; NOT value-verified. To close: sample the daily $total_share series at the 4 quarter-end trading days (untested). жһңд»Ғ_20251231_жҺ’йҷӨSTжҺ’йҷӨз§‘еҲӣ_жҺ’еҗҚ-SharesAvgGrPY.xlsx || RAW жҖ»иӮЎжң¬ VERIFIED (2026-07-01 fresh export): current жҖ»иӮЎжң¬ penny-exact vs жһңд»Ғ (Spearman 1.000, жҖ»иӮЎжң¬(дәҝ)x1e8=$total_share) -> the divergence is NOT the жҖ»иӮЎжң¬ source but the AvgQ HISTORICAL quarter-end sampling (total_share_q4..q7) on еўһеҸ‘/еӣһиҙӯ firms.

в—‘ CALIBER-CORRECTED, residual GENUINE (2026-07-01, raw-primitive decomposition): rebuilt with жһңд»Ғ's actual REPORT-PERIOD sumq(еҲҶзәўжҖ»йҮ‘йўқ,4,0)/sumq(,4,4) window (NOT ann-date-365d - see DivOP%). Spearman 0.985, med rel-err 0.060%, top-5/10/20 = 4/5, 9/10, 16/20 (was 3/5,8/10,15/20). Raw primitives verified (жҖ»иӮЎжң¬ вң… penny, еҲҶзәў=иӮЎжҒҜзҺҮxжҖ»иӮЎжң¬ вң…). The residual top-5 miss is GENUINE growth-ratio fragility (unstable tiny prior-year base -> explosive growth -> hypersensitive order, йӣ…иүәз§‘жҠҖ-type), NOT a caliber gap - no window fix removes it (unlike DivOP%, whose stable иҗҘдёҡеҲ©ж¶Ұ denominator made it clean after the same fix). жһңд»Ғ_20251231_жҺ’йҷӨSTжҺ’йҷӨз§‘еҲӣ_жҺ’еҗҚ-DivGrPY.xlsx

factors.local_expr: Stdev(daily-ffill еҲҶзәўжҖ»йҮ‘йўқ-TTM total, 720td) вҖ” declared_div_ttm x жҖ»иӮЎжң¬, monthly-checkpoint approx (staged)
factors.verdict: в—‘ LOCAL BUILT, жһңд»Ғ-EXPORT DEFERRED (2026-07-01, T1 batch): local series staged = Stdev over 720td of the daily-forward-filled еҲҶзәўжҖ»йҮ‘йўқ-TTM total (declared_div_ttm x жҖ»иӮЎжң¬, monthly-checkpoint approximation; n=4598, median std ~26M е…ғ). жһңд»Ғ export NOT obtained: (1) it is a templated иҮӘе®ҡд№ү (жіўеҠЁзҺҮ_ж—ҘеәҰжҢҮж Ү) needing еҲҶзәўжҖ»йҮ‘йўқ/720 param config, and the edit param-editor was not drivable (edit icon not positioned + жһңд»Ғ rate-limit 'ж“ҚдҪңеӨӘеҝ«'); (2) FUNDAMENTAL caliber ambiguity - how жһңд»Ғ daily-izes a quarterly еҲҶзәўжҖ»йҮ‘йўқ (forward-filled TTM vs raw events, per-share vs total, жҖ»иӮЎжң¬ timing) is unpinned, so even a successful export would be a caveated rank-correlation only. dep=1, lowest usage - DEFERRED. To finish: configure the жһңд»Ғ template params via the edit dialog (rate-limit permitting) + pin the daily-ization caliber.
factors.note: T1 batch; local built+staged; жһңд»Ғ export deferred (templated-param UI + rate-limit + daily-ization caliber ambiguity)

factors.local_expr: annual(еҲҶзәў,0&1&2)>0 = paid FY2024&2023&2022 (declared_dividend_by_fy + list_year<=2022 gate); count-type
factors.verdict: в—‘ COUNT-APPROX (2026-07-01, T1 batch): 94.3% exact-match (100% coverage) with the discrete caliber annual(еҲҶзәў,0/1/2)>0 = a dividend paid in EACH of FY2024/2023/2022 (per-FY declared_dividend_by_fy, PIT ann<=signal) + a list_year<=2022 gate. I OVER-mark ~250 (my 2413 =1 vs жһңд»Ғ 2164). RULED OUT two decodes: (a) the tracker's min(иӮЎжҒҜзҺҮ,750td)>0 continuous-yield variant is TOO STRICT (annual-announcement drift creates brief trailing-yield 0-gaps -> only 421 =1, 60% match) so it is NOT жһңд»Ғ's def; (b) annual-only end_date=1231 is worse (92.8%). Residual ~5.7% = a subtler annual-dividend-existence rule (late-FY2024 announcers / young-firm annual-offset) not fully pinned. Boolean FILTER (top-K degenerate/irrelevant); usable with caveat; spot-check the ~250 if load-bearing. жһңд»Ғ_20251231_жҺ’йҷӨSTжҺ’йҷӨз§‘еҲӣ_жҺ’еҗҚ-иҝһз»ӯ3е№ҙеҲҶзәў.xlsx
factors.note: T1 batch; 94.3% count-approx; ruled out min(иӮЎжҒҜзҺҮ,750) & annual-only; residual = subtle annual-existence rule

factors.verdict: вң… VERIFIED (2026-07-01, raw-primitive decomposition): after fixing the еҲҶзәўжҖ»йҮ‘йўқ caliber to REPORT-PERIOD, top-5/10/20 = 100%/90%/95%, Pearson 1.000, median rel-err 0.031% (payer domain; е»әеҸ‘иӮЎд»Ҫ 0.235->0.1007 = жһңд»Ғ 0.102). RAW PRIMITIVES all verified EXACT: жҖ»иӮЎжң¬ (Spearman 1.000, fresh export жҖ»иӮЎжң¬(дәҝ)x1e8=$total_share), иҗҘдёҡеҲ©ж¶ҰTTM (Pearson 1.000, med rel-err 0.0000%, fresh export), еҲҶзәў=жҜҸиӮЎиӮЎеҲ©(иӮЎжҒҜзҺҮ-validated)xжҖ»иӮЎжң¬. ROOT CAUSE of the earlier 'top-K 40% fragile' was NOT an unstable denominator - it was the WRONG еҲҶзәўжҖ»йҮ‘йўқ window: жһңд»Ғ sumq(еҲҶзәўжҖ»йҮ‘йўқ,4,0) sums the last 4 FISCAL QUARTERS (by end_date), NOT my ann-date trailing-365d declared_div_ttm (which double-counts an interim dividend whose end_date is >4Q back). Caliber = (Sum per-share div over end_date in {last 4 quarters} x жҖ»иӮЎжң¬)/TTMиҗҘдёҡеҲ©ж¶Ұ. Reusable: guorn_dividend_caliber.declared_dividend_by_quarter. жһңд»Ғ_20251231_жҺ’йҷӨSTжҺ’йҷӨз§‘еҲӣ_жҺ’еҗҚ-DivOP.xlsx

factors.local_expr: market trading-days since max(ann_date,f_ann_date) of latest income report, MINUS 1 (жһңд»Ғ days-since convention)
factors.verdict: вң… VERIFIED count-exact (2026-07-01, T1 batch): EXACT-match 99.7% (100% cov, 4412/4412), Spearman 0.997. Caliber = market trading days SINCE the latest income report's announcement max(ann_date,f_ann_date), PIT ann<=signal. жһңд»Ғ convention = days-SINCE (my [ann,T]-inclusive count MINUS 1; local-1==жһңд»Ғ for 99.7%). top-K 20/60/80% is DEGENERATE (not a divergence): иҙўжҠҘеҸ‘еёғеӨ©ж•° is a heavy-TIES integer (most firms 44-46 td since the 2025Q3 report) so top-K is a tie-shuffle, like ATR%'s 2dp ties - the count-exact 99.7% IS the verdict. 14 misses (0.3%) = recent-IPO (301/001) first-report timing edges. жһңд»Ғ_20251231_жҺ’йҷӨSTжҺ’йҷӨз§‘еҲӣ_жҺ’еҗҚ-иҙўжҠҘеҸ‘еёғеӨ©ж•°.xlsx

factors.local_expr: mean[(declared_div_FY x жҖ»иӮЎжң¬)/n_income_attr_p_cum_(q3 FY24/q7 FY23)] 2yr, ifnull->FY24
factors.verdict: в—‘ VALUE-FAITHFUL (normal band) / TOP-K & tail DIVERGED (2026-07-01, T1 batch): normal payout ratios match (еқӨжі° 0.3001=0.3001, еҚҺжі° 0.30, е»әиЎҢ 0.30, й…’й¬јй…’ 8.10=8.10) but WEAKEST of the dividend family: Spearman 0.877, median rel-err 7.0%, within-5% 46%, top-5 1/5. Caliber = 2yr-avg payout mean[(еҲҶзәўжҖ»йҮ‘йўқFY/еҮҖеҲ©ж¶ҰFY) FY2024,FY2023], ifnull->FY2024; еҲҶзәўжҖ»йҮ‘йўқ=declared x жҖ»иӮЎжң¬, FYеҮҖеҲ©ж¶Ұ=n_income_attr_p_cum_q3(FY2024)/_q7(FY2023). TWO divergence sources: (1) net-income DENOMINATOR instability - near-zero/negative FY NI explodes/sign-flips (еҢ—йҷҶиҚҜдёҡ 45.95 vs 2.06, жәўеӨҡеҲ© 13.2 vs -0.58); (2) per-FY-NI cum-offset mapping (cum_q3/q7) fragile for irregular-reporting firms. Unstable-denominator family, weakest member - value-faithful only in the normal 0.1-1 payout band. Don't chase. жһңд»Ғ_20251231_жҺ’йҷӨSTжҺ’йҷӨз§‘еҲӣ_жҺ’еҗҚ-DivNetIncY2.xlsx
factors.note: T1 batch; normal-band faithful, weakest member (NI denom instability + FY-NI offset fragility)

factors.verdict: в—‘ VALUE-FAITHFUL, TOP-K marginal (2026-07-01, T1 batch): domain-exact (intersection 3229/3229), Spearman 0.979, median rel-err 0.069%, sign 90%; жһңд»Ғ's top near-exact (йӣ…иүәз§‘жҠҖ 22.33=22.33, еӣҪжңәжұҪиҪҰ 20.0, иҝӘе®үиҜҠж–ӯ 13.81, еҚҺиҮҙй…’иЎҢ 10.16, жӯЈејәиӮЎд»Ҫ 9.2). top-5/10/20 = 4/5, 8/10, 15/20 (top-5/10 >=80%, top-20 75%). One explosive miss жӯЈдё№иӮЎд»Ҫ 34.0 vs 54.0 (tiny FY2023 base). Caliber = (annualеҲҶзәўFY2024 - FY2023)/FY2023 on the declared per-share caliber. Same unstable-denominator family as DivGrPY% (value/caliber faithful, selection tail fragile) - milder. жһңд»Ғ_20251231_жҺ’йҷӨSTжҺ’йҷӨз§‘еҲӣ_жҺ’еҗҚ-DivAGrPY.xlsx

в—‘ rank-faithful (Spearman 0.998, Pearson 0.999, cov 91% of R&D-reporters) but value ~2Г— = R&D-basis caliber (жһңд»Ғ likely з ”еҸ‘жҠ•е…Ҙ incl capitalized vs my expensed $rd_exp TTM). top-K cheap/smallest 60/70/85, largest 60/50/55. Sub-universe (R&D-reporters), 1 book. $total_mv/TTM($rd_exp_sq), lag-0.

вң— NOT reproduced вҖ” ROOT CAUSE = жһңд»Ғ-side formula bug (2026-07-01, help-doc-confirmed + empirically verified; supersedes the earlier vague "unstable-denominator" note). жһңд»Ғ иҮӘе®ҡд№үеҮҪж•°еҲ—иЎЁ В§дәҢ: ref(x,N) steps by TRADING DAY (not report-quarter), and ref(x,0) returns the DATA-START first-day value (дёҠеёӮз¬¬дёҖеӨ©; 2007-01-04 for pre-2007 stocks) вҖ” NOT today. So EpsTTMGr% = (ref(жҜҸиӮЎж”¶зӣҠ,0)вҲ’ref(жҜҸиӮЎж”¶зӣҠ,4))/abs(ref(жҜҸиӮЎж”¶зӣҠ,4))вҲ’1 evaluates to (жҜҸиӮЎж”¶зӣҠ@2007-01-04 вҲ’ жҜҸиӮЎж”¶зӣҠ@4-trading-days-ago)/|now| вҲ’ 1: a ~19-yr EPS level-change plus an erroneous trailing вҲ’1, NOT a TTM-YoY. (жһңд»Ғ own canonical growth caliber = (TTM(x,0)вҲ’TTM(x,4))/abs(TTM(x,4)), иҙўеҠЎжҢҮж Үе…¬ејҸ line 65; жҜҸиӮЎж”¶зӣҠ itself = TTM(еҪ’жҜҚеҮҖеҲ©ж¶Ұ,0)/жҖ»иӮЎжң¬, line 75.) CONFIRMED by inverting жһңд»Ғ EpsTTMGr%+жҜҸиӮЎж”¶зӣҠ вҶ’ implied ref(жҜҸиӮЎж”¶зӣҠ,0): иҢ…еҸ°1.44/дёҮз§‘0.42/ж јеҠӣ0.73/жҒ’з‘һ0.57/е·ҘиЎҢ0.11 (all match 2006-era EPS; universe median 0.58вүҲ2007 levels; ratio X0/X4 dispersed вҲ’98..+172 = ancient/current, not YoYвүҲ1). The жҜҸиӮЎж”¶зӣҠ FIELD reproduces cleanly (Spearman 0.9975); the composite is irreproducible because its target is a mis-written-formula artifact, not an economic factor вҖ” nothing to chase. export col EpsTTMGr% in жһңд»Ғ_20251231_жҺ’йҷӨSTжҺ’йҷӨз§‘еҲӣ_жҺ’еҗҚ-ATRN50+EpsTTMGr.xlsx
factors.note: жһңд»Ғ ref(x,0)=first-data-day(2007-01-04) gotcha; formula bug, not a caliber gap

Exact sortino top-K needs the web template-N export (friction) for a 1-book factor; returns-construction confirmed reproducible. lag-0.

вң… low-vol selection (д»Һе°ҸеҲ°еӨ§, the actual use) top-5/10/20 = 100/100/100, Spearman 0.997. Value: жһңд»Ғ ANNUALIZES (вүҲГ—вҲҡ250) so raw rel-err is huge but rank-identical; the relevant low-vol selection reproduces perfectly. High-vol extreme (largest dir) diverges = recent-IPO <60d coverage, not the selection zone. Std($pct_chg,60), lag-0.

в—‘ rank-faithful, precision-capped by жһңд»Ғ's 2-decimal export: within-0.01 (one rounding unit) 99.9%, Spearman 0.966, sign 100%, cov 99.5%. жһңд»Ғ factor = custom ATRN, formula ATR(N)/еҗҺеӨҚжқғж”¶зӣҳд»· (edit-dialog confirmed); verified at N=50 (ATRN(50)) вҶ’ transfers to the book's N=20 (identical formula). Value-exact/top-K NOT assessable: жһңд»Ғ exports 2dp only вҶ’ 12 distinct values over 4412 вҶ’ top-5 tie at 0.13. Caliber = simple-MA TrueRange/close (rawвүҲеҗҺеӨҚжқғ; NOT Wilder вҖ” Wilder scored worse, Spearman 0.881). NOT a local bug. export col ATRN(50) in жһңд»Ғ_20251231_жҺ’йҷӨSTжҺ’йҷӨз§‘еҲӣ_жҺ’еҗҚ-ATRN50+EpsTTMGr.xlsx
